assertions.title: Price chart renders

steps.action: Open http://localhost:3102 and inspect chart panel
steps.expected: Line chart with colored trend line and gradient fill is visible
steps.observed: Chart panel shows 'No chart data available' placeholder instead of a rendered line chart

steps.expected: Chart re-renders with data for selected range
steps.observed: Range state toggles, but chart remains in no-data placeholder state

steps.action: Verify candle data availability via in-browser API fetch checks
steps.expected: At least one interval returns non-empty candle array
steps.observed: GET /candles returned HTTP 200 with empty arrays for 1m/5m/15m/1h/1d; 4h returned HTTP 400

evidence.consoleErrors: none (agent-browser errors returned no JavaScript runtime errors)
evidence.network: Observed GET /candles?interval=1h and GET /candles?interval=5m from UI; explicit browser fetch checks: 1m=200 len0, 5m=200 len0, 15m=200 len0, 1h=200 len0, 1d=200 len0, 4h=400

assertions.issues: Blocked by absence of candle data in API responses; assertion requires rendered line chart dependent on candle dataset.

assertions.title: Chart hover interaction

steps.action: Move mouse across chart area to trigger hover/crosshair
steps.expected: Crosshair/tooltip appears with exact price + timestamp, and header price follows hover point
steps.observed: No crosshair or tooltip appears; chart area remains in no-data placeholder state

steps.action: Retry hover after changing chart range
steps.expected: Hover interaction activates on plotted data
steps.observed: No plotted data appears after range changes, so hover interaction cannot be exercised

evidence.consoleErrors: none (agent-browser errors returned no JavaScript runtime errors)
evidence.network: UI requested /candles endpoints but returned no usable candle data for rendering, preventing hover target generation

assertions.issues: Blocked because chart data is empty; hover/crosshair contract cannot be validated without rendered candle/line points.

blockers.description: Candle dataset unavailable for tested intervals during validation run
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Reloaded app, switched time ranges, and ran direct in-browser fetch checks against /candles intervals (1m, 5m, 15m, 1h, 1d). All successful responses returned empty arrays.

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 0 passed, 0 failed, 2 blocked due to missing candle data required for chart rendering and hover validation.
